name: Ganesh Kalal
headline: Project Engineer – Civil & Infrastructure
summary: Project Engineer with experience across demolition, remediation and civil works. Strong focus on safety, QA/QC, planning, stakeholder coordination and site delivery. Comfortable working with subcontractors, consultants and authorities to deliver safe, compliant outcomes.
skills: Site engineering, set-out coordination, and subcontractor management
Method statements, SWMS, risk assessments and permit-to-work processes
QA/QC documentation: ITPs, checklists, lot tracking, NCRs and close-out
Civil works coordination: excavation, services, concrete and reinstatement
Reporting: daily diaries, progress updates, RFIs and variations

projects.title: Key Projects (Sample)
bullets: Planned and coordinated staged demolition activities to maintain safety and minimise disruption
Managed subcontractors, site access, inductions, and exclusion zones
Coordinated waste streams, separation, tracking and disposal documentation
Maintained QA records and supported inspections and close-out
Delivered site works with strong focus on safety, quality and schedule
Prepared daily reports and coordinated subcontractor sequencing
Supported stakeholder coordination and permit requirements

education.title: Bachelor of Engineering (Civil) – University Name
bullets: Key subjects: Structures, Geotechnical, Construction Management
Professional goal: progress toward CPEng / RPEV (as applicable)
